commentary_links.hebrew: כֵּֽן־תַּעֲשֶׂ֥ה לְשֹׁרְךָ֖ לְצֹאנֶ֑ךָ שִׁבְעַ֤ת יָמִים֙ יִהְיֶ֣ה עִם־אִמּ֔וֹ בַּיּ֥וֹם הַשְּׁמִינִ֖י תִּתְּנוֹ־לִֽי׃
commentary_links.english: You shall do the same with your cattle and your flocks: seven days their male first-bornjtheir male first-born Heb. “it.” shall remain with its mother; on the eighth day you shall give it to Me.
